options.name: <rcCornerName>
options.description: Name of the RC corner to query

options.name: -T
options.description: Temperature, in units of Celsius, to use to derate resistance values

options.name: -cap_table
options.description: Capacitance table to use for extraction when using this RC corner

options.name: -postRoute_cap
options.description: Capacitance scale factor for RC extraction in post-route mode

options.name: -postRoute_clkcap
options.description: Scale factor for capacitance of clock nets in the postroute extraction mode

options.name: -postRoute_clkres
options.description: Scale factor for resistance of clock nets in the postroute extraction mode

options.name: -postRoute_res
options.description: Resistance scale factor for RC extraction in post-route mode

options.name: -postRoute_xcap
options.description: Cross-coupling capacitance scale factor for RC extraction in postroute mode

options.name: -preRoute_cap
options.description: Capacitance scale factor for RC extraction in post-route mode

options.name: -preRoute_clkcap
options.description: Scale factor for capacitance of clock nets in preroute mode

options.name: -preRoute_clkres
options.description: Scale factor for resistance of clock nets in preroute mode

options.name: -preRoute_res
options.description: Resistance scale factor for RC extraction in pre-route mode

options.name: -qx_tech_file
options.description: Name of an QRC technology (.tch) file used by TQRC/IQRC or QRC sign-off RC extraction

options.name: -thru_substrate_cell_subckt_file
options.description: Return file containing subcircuit models for FTV cells
